imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Multiple servers icon illustration showing stacked or clustered servers in a simple, clean style matching existing attack path icons (multiple-servers.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Add the ability to load and display user-provided images or pictures within the attack path diagram canvas
Add a multiple servers icon to the attack path visualizer toolbar for representing server clusters or multiple server instances

new_feature_requests.summary: Add ability to load images/pictures in attack path visualizer diagram
Add multiple servers icon to attack path visualizer
Update the backend DiagramState type to support storing uploaded image data including image content and metadata
